ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the player represents */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player represents */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Player's weight */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Coach associated with the player (foreign key to `coaches` table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opposition" TEXT /* Team the player competed against */,
  "tournament_stage" TEXT /* Stage of the tournament (e.g., Final Round) */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number in the tournament */,
  "competition" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., mens-olympics) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team (if applicable) */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team (if applicable) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Names of the referees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Tournament to which the game belongs (foreign key to `tournaments` table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_competition FOREIGN KEY ("competition") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament took place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., round-robin, knockout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the coach represents */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style (e.g., aggressive, defensive) */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements or awards */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team the coach is associated with (foreign key to `teams` table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g. coach, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role identifier for the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Coach associated with the team (foreign key to `coaches` table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
column_names: Position the player plays (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C)
